user.title: Connect to Maxspect device
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Maxspect device on the local network.

cloud.title: Gizwits Cloud account
cloud.description: Enter your Syna-G+ Cloud account credentials. These are needed to send control commands (on/off, mode changes) to the device.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device. Check the IP address and ensure the device is on the same network.
error.cloud_auth_failed: Cloud login failed. Check your Syna-G+ Cloud credentials and region.
